name: Poppy Seed Breakfast Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch bundt pan.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Cream butter with 1 1/2 cups sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Continue beating until the mixture is smooth.
7. Add dry ingredients to the batter alternately with buttermilk mixture, beating gently after each addition.
8. Whisk egg whites until stiff but not dry.
9. Fold the egg whites into the batter using a spatula.
10. Spoon half of the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with remaining sugar and cinnamon.
11. Add the remaining batter to the pan and spread evenly.
12. Bake for about 1 hour, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
13. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 20 minutes before inverting onto a serving platter.
14. Serve warm.
